input:
Title: [RFC] Replace TaskIQ with Celery for task queue
Author: Dmitri Volkov
Labels: rfc, infrastructure
Status: Open for discussion until May 15

Body:
Proposal: migrate from TaskIQ to Celery 5.x for the background task queue. Motivation: TaskIQ has limited documentation and no Redis Streams support.

Pros: mature ecosystem, Redis Streams support, built-in retry logic.
Cons: heavier dependency, different API.

Primary reviewer: Hana Novak (Platform). Secondary: Arjun Singh (Backend).

Decision expected by May 15.
